articles.title: Impaired Stoneham teen drove 118 mph, fled police, and then crashed, N.H. authorities say
articles.description:
Authorities said the 18-year-old was arrested after leading police on a pursuit through several towns.

The post Impaired Stoneham teen drove 118 mph, fled police, and then crashed, N.H. authorities say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Stoneham teen, 18, led police on a high-speed chase reaching 118 mph.
Pursuit spanned several towns in New Hampshire before the teen crashed.
Local authorities emphasize dangers of impaired driving for community safety.

articles.title: The ‘World’s Shortest St. Paddy’s Day Parade’ is still New England’s nuttiest St. Pat’s fever dream
articles.description:
But is it really the shortest? The answer may soon be coming to a documentary near you.

The post The ‘World’s Shortest St. Paddy’s Day Parade’ is still New England’s nuttiest St. Pat’s fever dream appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: The World's Shortest St. Paddy's Day Parade takes place in Boston, attracting local crowds annually.
The parade's length is debated, with a documentary exploring its unique status coming soon.
Boston residents enjoy this quirky event, enhancing community spirit and local tourism during St. Patrick's Day.

articles.title: Massachusetts ER doctors say long wait times reflect a health system under strain
articles.description:
Emergency doctors say hospital bed shortages, an aging population, and gaps in primary care are driving delays.

The post Massachusetts ER doctors say long wait times reflect a health system under strain appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Emergency room wait times in Massachusetts are increasing due to hospital bed shortages.
Aging population and primary care gaps contribute to delays affecting Boston residents.
Patients may face longer wait times for critical care in local emergency departments.
